TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Bigelow nalecuhan i Boston, Massachusetts, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Bigelow i 1975 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Kansas City Kings putiput. 12 bulad 26 demiad, 1953 a mihca, Bob Bigelow, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob bigər~ɾow nar~ɾəʦuħan i boston, massaʦħusətts, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob bigər~ɾow i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu kansas ʦitj kiŋs putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob bigər~ɾow, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Bob Bigelow nalecuhan i Boston, Massachusetts, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Bob Bigelow i 1975 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 13, namapili' tu nu Kansas City Kings putiput. 12 bulad 26 demiad, 1953 a mihca, Bob Bigelow, miunduay.
S.PHON: bob bigər~ɾow nar~ɾəʦuħan i boston, massaʦħusətts, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. bob bigər~ɾow i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu kansas ʦitj kiŋs putiput. ** bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, bob bigər~ɾow, miunduaj.
